author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi' Second Season in Production
The 12th and final episode of Kanan-sama wa Akumade Choroi (Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy) ended with an announcement on Sunday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed a commemorative illustration drawn by character designer Akari Minagawa (pictured right). Produced by Studio Kai, the anime series adapting nonco's supernatural romcom manga began airing on April 5. Crunchyroll streamed the anime in multiple subtitles and dubs in English, German, and Thai...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Akane-banashi' Second Season Announced for Winter 2027
The 12th and final episode of Akane-banashi ended with a second season announcement on Saturday, scheduled to air on the IMAnimation programming block on TV Asahi's 24 affiliate stations and BS Asahi in January 2027. The official website also announced six supporting cast that appeared in the final episode. Cast Miroku Kashiwaya: Houchuu Ootsuka (Golden Kamuy) Shoumei Tsubakiya: Ryoutarou Okiayu (Dorohedoro) Ensou Sanmeitei: Hiroshi Naka (Dungeon Meshi) Urara Ransaika: Mutsumi Tamura (Gachi...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Sayonara Lara' Reveals Supporting Cast Pair, Ending Theme, Third Promo
The official website of the Sayonara Lara (Goodbye, Lara) original television anime unveiled a supporting pair of cast, ending theme, the third main visual (pictured), and promotional video on Saturday. The original anime is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX at 12:30 a.m. on July 6, followed by AT-X, BS Asahi, and Yomiuri TV. Voice actors Minami Tsuda (Toumei Otoko to Ningen Onna) and Kazutomi Yamamoto (Touken Ranbu Kai) are joining the cast as Lisa and Kota, respectively. Singer-songwriter Han...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai sareta Majo desu.' Reveals Main Cast, Staff for Fall 2026
The official website of the Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai sareta Majo desu. (Hi, I'm a Witch, and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion) television anime revealed the main cast, staff, and a teaser promo on Saturday. The anime series adapting Eiko Mutsuhana's fantasy romance light novel will air in October 2026. Voice actors Mikako Komatsu (Hai to Gensou no Grimgar) and Youhei Azakami (Yuusha-kei ni Shosu) are starring as Rose and Harij, respectively. Staff Director: Keiz...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Yami Shibai' 17th Season Announced for Summer 2026
Television station TV Tokyo announced a 17th season for the Yami Shibai short horror anime series on Friday. The official website also revealed the staff, cast, key visual (pictured), and the theme song. The new season—centered on the theme of "Ketsu" (Decision)—will begin airing on July 12 on TV Tokyo. Staff Director: Akira Funada (Ninja Collection) Script: Kanako Ishigami (Yami Shibai 15), Hiromu Kumamoto (Kowabon), Mitsuhiro Sasaki (KJ File) Storyboard: Shoma Mutou (Yami...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Neko to Ryuu' Reveals Additional Cast, Theme Songs, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Amara's Neko to Ryuu (The Cat and the Dragon) light novel revealed additional cast, theme songs, key visual (pictured above) and second promotional video on Friday. The anime will premiere on Tokyo MX at 9:00 p.m. on July 4, followed by broadcasts on BS NTV and Yomiuri TV. Cast Greater Daemon: Hinata Tadokoro (Champignon no Majo) Mosha-mosha IV: Youji Ueda (Toujima Tanzaburou wa Kamen Rider ni Naritai) Mikemike: Saho Shirasu (Apoc...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Tenkou-saki no Seiso Karen na Bishoujo ga, Mukashi Danshi to Omotte Issho ni Asonda Osananajimi Datta Ken' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Main Promo
The official website for the Tenkou-saki no Seiso Karen na Bishoujo ga, Mukashi Danshi to Omotte Issho ni Asonda Osananajimi Datta Ken (Tenkosaki: The Neat and Pretty Girl at My New School Is a Childhood Friend of Mine Who I Thought Was a Boy) television anime unveiled additional staff, a main visual (pictured), and the second main promotional video on Friday. The anime series adapting Yu Hibari's romance comedy light novel will begin airing on July 6 at 11:30 p.m. on Tokyo MX and BS Fuji....
